{{Infobox location
| name = Arelius family library
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius family]] has a [[library]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius family library]] contains an analysis on the uses of a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius family library]] contains information about [[Paths]] and techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
